tweets.text:
Cesar Orlando Castro Serrano, a criminal illegal alien from El Salvador, has been arrested by @ICEgov after being on the run for the past 2 years.

Serrano has been wanted by Houston police since 2023 after he allegedly beat a 22-year-old Houston woman in the head with a tire iron and sexually assaulted her before leaving her in a wooded area behind an apartment complex in critical condition.

Serrano entered the United States illegally in 2015 under the Obama administration. Thanks to @POTUS Trump and @Sec_Noem this barbaric criminal will never victimize another American citizen.

card.title: ICE arrests illegal immigrant accused of brutal tire iron attack, sexual assault of Texas woman
